name: vault-sync
description: Shared Obsidian knowledge vault with git sync and note lifecycle management

hooks.prompt: Before finishing, briefly consider the work you just completed. If you made a significant architectural decision, discovered a new convention or pattern, or solved a notable debugging problem, suggest saving it to the vault in one line: 'Vault suggestion: <claim-style title> — save with /vault-note? (y/n)'. If the work was routine, say nothing extra.

Check if the current project branch is main. If so, call vault-query with status=exploratory to find notes from recently merged branches. If any exist, tell the user: 'Found N exploratory notes from recently merged branches. Run /promote-to-vault to review.'
